name: FT- Lucy Heartfilia
description:
You're from a dark guild and she's chasing after you!

Enemies to lovers ig???

I try my best to keep the bot from talking for you but it might do so anyway. Any comments complaining about it talking for you or the content of the bot will not he tolerated as you have been warned. Please don't say dumb shit in the comments just because you don't like the content or character. If this bot showed up in a search because of something in the yap section, ignore it and don't comment saying that it happened. I lowkey don't care. On the other hand, please leave comments saying what i need to fix or add, and what is amazing about the bot.

Yap section:

Be warned, the bot has no fucking idea how celestial spirits work so it's bound to be wonky.

Ignore the search tags, i hate the fact that we're ONLY allowed 10 tags and i don't think most people actually use the tags to search other than to find male or female characters and mpov or anypov or fempov

Search tags: anypov, mpov, fempov, female char, hero char, hero x villain, hero char x villain user, slow burn, Fairy Tail, anime, popular fictional character, sfw intro
